name: claude-usage
description: Token usage and estimated cost from your local Claude Code logs, right in VS Code.

claude-usage.refreshInterval.markdownDescription: Seconds between background re-scans of the Claude data directory. Set to `0` to disable the interval fallback (the file watcher still applies).

claude-usage.showCost.description: Show estimated cost figures. When off, only token counts are shown.

claude-usage.currency.markdownDescription: Display currency. `auto` detects it from your system region (Philippines → `PHP` ₱, US → `USD` $, …). Or set an explicit ISO 4217 code (`PHP`, `EUR`, `JPY`). Costs are computed in USD, then converted with `currencyRate` and formatted with the matching symbol and thousands grouping.

claude-usage.currencyRate.markdownDescription: Multiplier applied to USD costs for display. Leave at `0` to use a bundled **approximate** rate for the display currency (offline, updated periodically). Set your own number (e.g. `56` for PHP) for an exact rate. The extension never fetches live exchange rates.

claude-usage.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the Claude Usage status bar item.

enumDescriptions: Time until your usage window resets and estimated quota left (e.g. "Claude 4:15 - 23%").
claude-usage.statusBar.metric.description: Which metric the status bar item displays.

claude-usage.claudePath.markdownDescription: Custom path to the Claude data directory. Leave empty to use `~/.claude`. `~` and environment variables are expanded.

claude-usage.daysToShow.description: Number of days shown in the daily usage chart.

claude-usage.budget.monthly.markdownDescription: Monthly budget in your display currency (see `currency`/`currencyRate`). When this month's estimated cost exceeds it, the status bar item shows a warning color. Set to `0` to disable.

claude-usage.resetWindow.hours.markdownDescription: Length in hours of the usage window used by the `resetTimer` status-bar metric. Claude subscriptions reset on a rolling 5-hour window; change only if yours differs.

claude-usage.resetWindow.tokenLimit.markdownDescription: Token quota per usage window, used to compute the **% left** in the `resetTimer` metric. Leave at `0` to auto-estimate from your historical peak usage. Your real plan limit isn't stored locally, so the percentage is always an estimate.

claude-usage.notifications.enabled.markdownDescription: Show a pop-up notification when your estimated spend crosses a budget or daily threshold. Each alert is shown at most once per period, and never nags on window reload.

claude-usage.notifications.budgetWarnAtP.markdownDescription: Send an early heads-up once this month's estimated cost reaches this percentage of `budget.monthly` (a separate alert fires at 100%). Set to `0` to only notify when the budget is exceeded. Requires a non-zero `budget.monthly`.

claude-usage.notifications.dailyCostThre.markdownDescription: Notify once per day when **today's** estimated cost passes this amount, in your display currency (e.g. `100` for ₱100/day). Set to `0` to disable the daily alert.

claude-usage.pricingOverrides.markdownDescription:
Per-model pricing overrides in USD per 1M tokens. Keys are model ids; each value may set `input`, `output`, `cacheWrite5m`, `cacheWrite1h`, `cacheRead`.

Example:
```json
{ "claude-opus-4-8": { "input": 5, "output": 25 } }
```

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
